docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LI, HUAYING AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, HUAYING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $50.00(WAIVED) SERVED APR-03-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HUAYING LI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUNPING LUO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, HUAYING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUO, JUNPING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
